reason: The only finding is a missing title on index.s1. The section content (s1) is complete and accurate, and the hints ["自動テストフレームワーク", "JUnit4", "テストデータ外部化", "Nablarch特化API", "アサート機能"] are comprehensive enough for the agent to retrieve this section. The empty title does not cause information loss or retrieval failure in practice.

findings_assessment.justification: The title '特徴' is missing from index.s1, but the five hints on s1 fully cover the section's content and enable correct retrieval. The section body itself is complete. An agent querying about the framework's characteristics will still reach s1 via hint matching. The missing title only affects display/navigation metadata, not the knowledge content or retrievability. Why it persisted: The Phase E output JSON is identical to Phase D — the fix was never applied. The E-phase agent identified the issue but did not mutate the title field from '' to '特徴', leaving the finding unresolved.
